items.name_en: 💰In stock Kelly Elan Goat Leather Black Gold/Silver Hardware Latest Kelly Elan Bestseller 🆕 Hand-waxed thread stitching
items.name_cn:
💰In stock Kelly Elan Goat Leather Black Gold/Silver Hardware Latest Kelly Elan Bestseller 🆕 Hand-waxed thread stitching
New member of the Kelly family Kelly Elan Size 27+ Replaces the first generation crossbody bag Upon seeing it in person, it feels like an enlarged Kelly To Go. Kelly Elan and Kelly 28 have similar bottom lengths. The bag's thickness is similar to the second generation. Large capacity. The shoulder strap is detachable but not adjustable in length. However, it is easy to carry regardless of height. Detach the strap to instantly turn it into a handbag. A bit like the Kelly Cut. In short, it is very beautiful.
💘💘Love it Love it Recommended

items.name_en: New Mini Shoulder Bag is Here
items.name_cn:
New Mini Shoulder Bag is Here
A new member has been added to the Kelly family. I was instantly obsessed with the online photos, and the first time I saw the real thing, it felt like an enlarged version of the Kelly To Go. The bottom length is similar to the Kelly 28. The bag's thickness is about the same as the second generation, and the capacity is excellent. The shoulder strap is detachable but not adjustable in length. However, it is easy to carry regardless of height. Detach the strap to turn it into a clutch with a bit of a Kelly Cut vibe, very commanding. In short, the look and practicality are both on point, highly recommended. 27.5✕15✕5
